hero.subheadline: Mosaed is an AI receptionist that answers patient calls 24/7 — booking appointments, answering questions, and reducing no-shows. Even when your front desk is closed.
hero.trustBadge: Trusted by clinics in Riyadh, Jeddah, and Dammam

problem.heading: Every Missed Call Is a Lost Patient.

card1.title: After Hours, Nobody Answers
card1.body: 40% of patient calls come outside working hours. Your clinic is closed. Your competitors are not.

card2.title: Your Receptionist Is Overwhelmed
card2.body: During peak hours, your front desk juggles walk-ins, paperwork, and a ringing phone. Calls go to voicemail. Patients hang up.

card3.title: No-Shows Cost You Revenue
card3.body: Without automated reminders and confirmations, 15-25% of booked appointments never show up. That is lost chair time and lost revenue.

solution.heading: Meet Mosaed. Your Always-On Receptionist.
solution.body: Mosaed is an AI-powered voice agent built specifically for clinics in Saudi Arabia. It speaks Arabic naturally, understands medical context, and handles patient calls with the professionalism your clinic demands — 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

step1.title: Connect
step1.body: We integrate Mosaed with your clinic's phone line and scheduling system. No hardware. No IT team needed.

step2.title: Customize
step2.body: Set your clinic's working hours, services, doctors, and booking rules. Mosaed learns your clinic's specific workflow.

step3.title: Go Live
step3.body: Mosaed starts answering calls immediately. You monitor everything from a simple dashboard.

features.heading: Built for Clinics. Not Generic AI.

feature1.title: 24/7 Call Answering
feature1.body: Patients call at 11 PM? During Friday prayer? On Eid? Mosaed answers every single call.

feature2.title: Appointment Booking & Rescheduling
feature2.body: Mosaed checks real-time availability and books directly into your scheduling system. No double bookings. No back-and-forth.

feature3.title: Automated Reminders
feature3.body: SMS and WhatsApp reminders reduce no-shows by up to 35%. Patients confirm, cancel, or reschedule — all handled automatically.

feature4.title: Natural Arabic Conversation
feature4.body: Mosaed speaks Saudi Arabic fluently. Patients feel like they are talking to a real receptionist, not a machine.

feature5.title: Caller Insights Dashboard
feature5.body: See every call, every booking, every missed opportunity. Know exactly what is happening at your front desk.

feature6.title: Healthcare Data Compliance
feature6.body: Patient data stays in the Kingdom. Built with healthcare data privacy standards from day one.

roi.heading: The Numbers Speak.
roi.closing: One missed call could cost your clinic 2,000+ SAR in lifetime patient value. How many are you missing today?

socialProof.heading: Trusted by Clinics Across the Kingdom.

testimonial1.quote: We were losing 30+ calls a week after hours. In the first month with Mosaed, we booked 47 new appointments from those calls alone.
testimonial1.author: Dr. Fahad Al-Otaibi

testimonial2.quote: Our receptionist used to be overwhelmed. Now Mosaed handles the routine calls and she focuses on patients in the clinic. It changed our workflow completely.
testimonial2.author: Operations Manager

testimonial3.quote: Setup took one afternoon. I was skeptical about AI, but our patients genuinely think they are speaking to a person.
testimonial3.author: Dr. Sara Al-Harbi

q1.question: Will patients know they are speaking to an AI?
q1.answer: Mosaed uses natural Arabic conversation. Most patients will not notice. However, we always recommend transparency — a brief introduction like "You are speaking with Mosaed, the clinic's automated assistant" builds trust.

q2.question: Does it work with my existing phone number?
q2.answer: Yes. Mosaed connects to your current clinic number through call forwarding. No number change needed.

q3.question: What scheduling systems do you support?
q3.answer: We integrate with most major clinic management systems used in Saudi Arabia. During setup, our team ensures compatibility with your existing software.

q4.question: How long does setup take?
q4.answer: Most clinics go live within 48 hours. No technical expertise required from your side.

q5.question: What happens if Mosaed cannot handle a call?
q5.answer: If a call requires human attention — such as an emergency or a complex medical question — Mosaed transfers the call to your staff or takes a message for immediate callback.

q6.question: How much does it cost?
q6.answer: We offer plans based on clinic size and call volume. Book a free demo and we will provide a custom quote based on your needs.

finalCta.headline: Stop Losing Patients to Missed Calls.
finalCta.subheadline: Book a free demo today. See exactly how Mosaed works for your clinic in under 15 minutes.
